quadrants.label: Northwest Quarter
quadrants.lore: The Old Tidegate and flood-scarred blocks where Meridian's first walls still stand. Smugglers, archivists, and forgotten signal towers cluster in the shadow of the northern seawall.

quadrants.label: Northeast Quarter
quadrants.lore: Guardian Spire rises over glass towers and AEGIS field offices. Hero-channel frequencies crackle here — order maintained through registry, posture, and containment.

quadrants.label: Southwest Quarter
quadrants.lore: Meridian Docks and the working harbor. Cargo runners, dockside families, and forbidden tech move through the lanes before dawn.

quadrants.label: Southeast Quarter
quadrants.lore: Halcyon Heights bleeds into market blocks and contested loyalty zones. Civic trust on the surface; debt and control underneath the gala lights.
